creator: karels@freebsd.org
text: I tested this with FreeBSD 13.2, albeit with two FreeBSD installs on separate partitions.  I was asked whether to reinstall the FreeBSD EFI loader, I said no, and the EFI partition was not reformatted.  Maybe this is fixed now.  I don't think I have a good test with a non-FreeBSD OS, but I'm open to suggestions.
